edition.dagbeeld: Iran en de VS blijven elkaar bestoken, terwijl de economische en geopolitieke gevolgen zich verbreden: olietankers mijden de Straat van Hormuz, Volkswagen snijdt in productie en Goldman Sachs tempert speculatiedrift bij eigen medewerkers. Op de achtergrond draait de journalistiek aan grote verhalen: van surveillancewetgeving die toch doorzet tot een journalist wiens byline na ontslag door een AI-bot werd overgenomen.

article.title: Iran strikes U.S. interests in Kuwait, Bahrain and Qatar in response to Washington bombings
article.summary: Iran’s Health Ministry said there were 14 dead and 78 injured in the latest US offensive. It also claims one projectile landed very close to a nuclear facility

opening.label: breaking

article.title: A Majority of European Lawmakers Voted Against Letting Big Tech Read Our Messages. They’re Going to Anyway.
article.summary: Companies will once again be allowed to scan citizens’ personal texts, emails, and social media messages via the “chat control” bill to find child abuse material online.

front.note: Chat control gaat toch door, ondanks Europese meerderheid ertegen — grote privacyinbreuk.

article.title: The New Axis of Evil: DER SPIEGEL Investigation Reveals Deep Military Cooperation between Russia and China
article.summary: Reporting by DER SPIEGEL and its partners provide a detailed and unprecedented look at the depth of military cooperation between Russia and China. Secret documents show the plans the two countries are developing.

article.title: Journalist fired by Clickout Media saw robot reporter take over their byline

article.title: Trump’s War-Not-War Is Doing Something Odd to the Economy
article.summary: Businesses and consumers are struggling to deal with the Iran war, which is simultaneously happening and not happening.

article.title: Volkswagen Is Cutting Production as Sales in China Plunge

article.title: LinkedIn and X Are Flooded With AI Spam, Browsing Data Suggests

items.title: 'Imperial obsession and reckless escalation: Vladimir Putin has never appeared so trapped by his fantasies'
items.summary: Defeated in his attempt to subjugate Ukraine by capturing Kyiv in early 2022 and unable, four years later, to conquer all the Ukrainian plains bordering Russia's western border, the Russian leader has taken revenge on civilian populations, says Le Monde columnist Alain Frachon.

items.summary: Last year, MIT’s Media Lab came out with a buzzy study on a phenomenon that’s been coined “cognitive debt.” In short, the researchers found that when ChatGPT users offloaded essay writing tasks to their AI assistants, their own writing abilities declined. items.title: Arnon Grunberg over The Catcher in the Rye : Wie zou Holden zijn zonder de schijnheiligheid van de volwassenen?
items.summary: The Catcher in the Rye , nu vijfenzeventig jaar oud, is een klassieker over de verwerping van de wereld van de volwassenen.
